pi_items.source: setup_task.sh script uses python code `inject_link(item, "LEGACY", "404")` and `inject_link(item, "LEGACY", "500")`
task_utils.sh function setup_task_project creates project at /home/ga/Documents/ReqView/fix_broken_links_project and setup_task.sh manipulates documents/SRS.json within it
setup_task.sh specifically calls inject_link(item, "LEGACY", "404") and inject_link(item, "LEGACY", "500")

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetically modified ReqView example project located at /home/ga/Documents/ReqView/fix_broken_links_project. The setup script deterministically injects exactly two broken traceability links into the SRS document (documents/SRS.json). These links use the docId "LEGACY" and reqIds "404" and "500". Specifically, they are injected into the 5th and 15th leaf node requirements in the document hierarchy, which correspond to requirement IDs "37" and "10". No other broken links are introduced.
